message.content:
@startuml
title Request Order Change

actor Buyer
actor Grower
actor Manager
participant System
database db

Buyer -> System : Make Order Change Request
System -> db : Insert Order Change Request
System -> Manager : Email Order Change Request

rectangle "Confirmation process" {
    Manager -> Buyer : Confirm details of Order Change Request over email
    Manager -> Grower : Confirm details of Order Change Request over email

    alt [All agreed?]
        Manager -> System : Edit Order
        System -> db : Update Order
        System -> db : Update Order Change Request
        System -> Grower : Email details Order Change
        System -> Buyer : Email details Order Change
    else [Not agreed to?]
        note right of System
            Nothing to do here unless we add a Change Request editing function
        end note
    end
}

Buyer --> Buyer
Grower --> Grower
Manager --> Manager
System --> System
db --> db

note right of System
    1. Email could also mean text message, phone call or face to face
end note

@enduml
